title: Contact Compensation Recovery Unit
body: "The Compensation Recovery Unit (CRU), as part of Department for Work and Pensions (DWP), works with insurance companies, solicitors and any DWP customers, to recover:   amounts of social security benefits paid as a result of an accident, injury or disease, if a compensation payment has been made (the Compensation Recovery Scheme) costs incurred by NHS hospitals and Ambulance Trusts for treatment from injuries from road traffic accidents and personal injury claims (Recovery of NHS Charges)   Contact the Compensation Recovery Unit  If you wish to contact us, use the phone number shown on the letter you have received from us. Alternatively you can email or write to us.  If you have a speech or hearing impairment our office has the Relay UK facility. The Relay UK number will be at the top of any letter we send you. The Relay UK number will be 18001 followed by the phone number.  Find out how to use the British Sign Language (BSL) video relay service if you’re on a computer.  Find out how to use the BSL video relay service on mobile or tablet.     Subject Email     Request certificate cru.highvolumeareacertificates@dwp.gov.uk   Notify settlement cru.highvolumeareasettlements@dwp.gov.uk   Personal injury claims cru.assessmentsA-Z@dwp.gov.uk   Disease claims cru.specialistoperations@dwp.gov.uk   Clinical negligence claims cru.clinicalnegligence@dwp.gov.uk    NHS cases cru.nhsops@dwp.gov.uk   Reviews cru.reviews@dwp.gov.uk   Dispute resolution team and reviews cru.appeals1@dwp.gov.uk   National recoupment team recoupment.CRU@dwp.gov.uk   Queries about online service or e-service cru.ebt@dwp.gov.uk     Customer feedback team     Subject Email     Feedback on guidance and legislation CRU.CustomerFeedback@dwp.gov.uk     Freedom of Information  If you have a request under the Freedom of Information Act that is specific to CRU, email cru.foi@dwp.gov.uk.  Postal address   Debt Centre SunderlandCompensation Recovery UnitPost Handling Site BWolverhamptonWV99 2FR   "
